_comment: Project-level hook registration for the uiux subsystem. GENERATED from manifests/hook-registry.json by orchestrator-runtime/shared/install-subsystem-hooks.js --emit-snippet — DO NOT hand-edit. Preferred install path is the SDK init (it copies hooks project-local AND merges this); this snippet is the manual fallback: copy the hook .js + _<sub>-common.js into <project>/.claude/hooks/, then merge "hooks" into <project>/.claude/settings.json.
